MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-10-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2014 Set For Trial On Mar-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Continued To Jul-23-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn Re Written Discovery & Related Mtn For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf And Their Attorney Philip Fant
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT KRISTINE DAILY's Motion Re Written Discovery & Related Motion For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Their Attorney Philip Fant. Defendants Mich Fromkin and Kristine E. Daily's Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Inspection Demand is granted; Defendants' Motion To Deem Admitted All Requests Of Admissions is denied. Sanctions in the amount of $490.00 is imposed against plaintiff's counsel. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
